title: Flower Vase Set of 4 Posy Vases, Small Glass Decorative Vases for Flowers, Living Room Home Decor Table Centerpiece
features: SET OF 4 VASES - This set includes four beautifully designed posy vases in different colours, perfect for displaying small floral arrangements or greenery in any room.
DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - Made from high-quality glass, these vases are sturdy and designed to last. They offer a crystal-clear view of your flowers or decorative items.
PERFECT CENTERPIECE - Ideal for creating elegant table centerpieces for weddings, dinner parties, or home decor, adding a refined touch to any setting.
EASY to CLEAN - The smooth glass surface makes these vases easy to clean by hand or in the dishwasher, maintaining their pristine appearance with minimal effort.
COMPACT and SPACE SAVING - The petite size of each vase makes them easy to display on smaller surfaces like desks, windowsills, or side tables without taking up too much space.
description: Add a touch of charm to your home with this set of 4 Posy Vase Bottles. Each dainty glass bottle features unique cut glass patterns and a subtle colour tint, making them the perfect accessory for any space. Whether displayed alone or filled with a small posy of flowers, these vases create a beautiful and elegant display
